parents.subject: LU-18222 doc: update man page with lqa_quota_ops

commit.subject: LU-10911 lustre: add an initial ec.txt to document ec
commit.message:
LU-10911 lustre: add an initial ec.txt to document ec

This is an initial text that documents the current
state of the erasure coding support in Lustre and how
to use it.
It is expected to be a living document and be
constantly updated and refined until the feature is
fully implemented and feature complete.

Test-Parameters: trivial
Signed-off-by: Ronnie Sahlberg <rsahlberg@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: I215f2bfa4b7982c52ed7e93085782d55930fa45a
